coverage.forecastRange: 2026-2027 third-party consensus; official 2026 net-investment plan separately disclosed
coverage.availabilityNote: FY2016-FY2025 are audited TotalEnergies SE consolidated annual actuals in USD millions. FY2026-FY2027 revenue, net income, capex and free cash flow are MarketScreener analyst-consensus estimates. The forecast operating-cash-flow values are transparently derived as forecast FCF plus forecast capex, because the source does not publish a separate aligned OCF estimate. No auditable annual forecast is retained beyond FY2027.

metrics.basis: Total S.A. consolidated IFRS financial statements; revenue is revenues from sales after excise taxes; capex is intangible assets and PP&E additions
metrics.verificationNote: The audited 2017 Registration Document provides FY2016 comparative financial statements. The official FY2016 results release corroborates Group-share net income, operating cash flow and investment spending; the audited report is final for revenue after excise taxes, year-end cash and accounting capex. FCF is calculated as operating cash flow plus capex.

metrics.basis: Total S.A. consolidated IFRS financial statements; revenue is revenues from sales after excise taxes; capex is intangible assets and PP&E additions
metrics.verificationNote: The audited 2017 Registration Document and official FY2017 results release agree on the Group-share profit, operating cash flow and investment trend. FCF is calculated as operating cash flow plus capex.

metrics.basis: Total S.A. consolidated IFRS financial statements; revenue is revenues from sales after excise taxes; capex is intangible assets and PP&E additions
metrics.verificationNote: The audited 2019 Universal Registration Document provides FY2018 comparative financial statements. The official FY2018 results release corroborates Group-share net income, operating cash flow and net-investment disclosures. FCF is calculated as operating cash flow plus capex.

metrics.basis: Total S.A. consolidated IFRS financial statements; revenue is revenues from sales after excise taxes; capex is intangible assets and PP&E additions
metrics.verificationNote: The audited 2019 Universal Registration Document and official FY2019 results release agree on Group-share net income and operating cash flow. FCF is calculated as operating cash flow plus capex.

metrics.basis: TotalEnergies SE consolidated IFRS financial statements; revenue is revenues from sales after excise taxes; capex is intangible assets and PP&E additions
metrics.verificationNote: The audited 2021 Universal Registration Document provides FY2020 comparative financial statements. The official FY2020 results release corroborates cash flow from operations and the loss environment. FCF is calculated as operating cash flow plus capex.

metrics.basis: TotalEnergies SE consolidated IFRS financial statements; revenue is revenues from sales after excise taxes; capex is intangible assets and PP&E additions
metrics.verificationNote: The audited 2021 Universal Registration Document and official FY2021 results release agree on TotalEnergies-share net income, cash flow from operations and investment disclosures. FCF is calculated as operating cash flow plus capex.

metrics.basis: TotalEnergies SE consolidated IFRS financial statements; revenue is revenues from sales after excise taxes; capex is intangible assets and PP&E additions
metrics.verificationNote: The audited 2023 Universal Registration Document provides FY2022 comparative financial statements. The official FY2022 results release corroborates TotalEnergies-share net income and cash-flow performance. FCF is calculated as operating cash flow plus capex.

metrics.basis: TotalEnergies SE consolidated IFRS financial statements; revenue is revenues from sales after excise taxes; capex is intangible assets and PP&E additions
metrics.verificationNote: The audited 2023 Universal Registration Document and official FY2023 results release agree on TotalEnergies-share net income and cash-flow performance. FCF is calculated as operating cash flow plus capex.

metrics.basis: TotalEnergies SE consolidated IFRS financial statements; revenue is revenues from sales after excise taxes; capex is intangible assets and PP&E additions
metrics.verificationNote: The audited 2025 Universal Registration Document provides FY2024 comparative financial statements. The official FY2024 results release corroborates the full-year result and cash-flow disclosure. FCF is calculated as operating cash flow plus capex.

metrics.basis: TotalEnergies SE consolidated IFRS financial statements; revenue is revenues from sales after excise taxes; capex is intangible assets and PP&E additions
metrics.verificationNote: The audited 2025 Universal Registration Document and official FY2025 results release agree on TotalEnergies-share net income, cash-flow and investment disclosures. FCF is calculated as operating cash flow plus capex.

metrics.status: Third-party consensus forecast; official 2026 net-investment plan separately disclosed
metrics.basis: MarketScreener UK analyst consensus in USD million; operating cash flow is derived as forecast FCF plus forecast capex; the official net-investment plan is a separate management metric
metrics.verificationNote: MarketScreener UK publishes FY2026 revenue, net income, capex and FCF consensus. Forecast operating cash flow is a transparent derived value of USD35,336m = FCF USD19,885m plus capex USD15,451m. TotalEnergies separately plans USD15bn of net investments in 2026; it is not substituted for accounting capex. Cash on hand and net change in cash are left blank because no aligned public annual consensus was retained.

metrics.basis: MarketScreener UK analyst consensus in USD million; operating cash flow is derived as forecast FCF plus forecast capex
metrics.verificationNote: MarketScreener UK publishes FY2027 revenue, net income, capex and FCF consensus. Forecast operating cash flow is a transparent derived value of USD33,879m = FCF USD18,255m plus capex USD15,624m. Cash on hand and net change in cash are left blank because no aligned public annual consensus was retained.

profitability.title: Revenue and Net Income
profitability.subtitle: USD million
profitability.basisLabel: Consolidated actuals FY2016-FY2025; analyst consensus FY2026-FY2027
profitability.sourceLine: Source: FY2025 Universal Registration Document, FY2025 Results, FY2026-27 Analyst Consensus
profitability.note: Actuals are official consolidated IFRS disclosures; forecast values are third-party analyst consensus.

cashInvestment.title: Investments and Free Cash Flow
cashInvestment.titleCn: TotalEnergies 投资与自由现金流
cashInvestment.subtitle: USD million
cashInvestment.basisLabel: Cash-flow-statement capex; FCF = operating cash flow plus capex
cashInvestment.sourceLine: Source: FY2025 Universal Registration Document, FY2025 Results, FY2026-27 Analyst Consensus
cashInvestment.note: Investment bars show intangible-assets and PP&E additions. FCF is operating cash flow plus capex; forecast FCF and capex are analyst consensus.

definitions.definition: Revenues from sales in the consolidated statement of income, i.e. sales after excise taxes.
Net income attributable to TotalEnergies shareholders (TotalEnergies share) under IFRS.
Cash flow from operating activities in the audited consolidated statement of cash flow. Forecast OCF is derived as analyst-consensus FCF plus analyst-consensus capex.
Calculated consistently as operating cash flow plus cash capex, where capex is a negative cash outflow. This matches the historical MarketScreener FCF series used for the forecast source.

Intangible assets and property, plant and equipment additions from the consolidated cash-flow statement, retained as a negative outflow in normalized data and shown as a positive investment column in the dashboard.
Cash and cash equivalents at year end from the consolidated balance sheet.
Net increase or decrease in cash and cash equivalents from the consolidated cash-flow statement, before the separately disclosed exchange-rate effect.

FY2026-FY2027 revenue, net income, capex and FCF are MarketScreener consensus estimates. TotalEnergies separately discloses a FY2026 USD15bn net-investment plan; it is retained as context, not substituted for accounting capex.
